name: fix-dangerously-skip-permissions
description: Remove --dangerously-skip-permissions flag and let .claude/settings.json permissions actually work

name: inject-previous-session-context
description: Feed continuation agents their previous session output (last log entries, test results, git log) instead of relying solely on .agent-state files

name: clean-review-feedback
description: Parse and format raw gh JSON review feedback into clean markdown before injecting into agent prompt

name: add-codebase-summary
description: Generate a codebase summary (tree + key files) during worktree setup and inject into initializer prompt

name: conditional-design-doc
description: Only inject full design doc on session 1; continuations get features.json + progress.md + design doc path reference

name: gate-verbose-flag
description: Only use --verbose when LOG_LEVEL=debug is set; default to non-verbose for production runs

name: agent-feedback-channel
description: Add .agent-state/signal.json support so agents can signal blocked/needs-clarification status to the orchestrator between sessions

name: trim-global-prompt
description: Remove redundant instructions from global-prompt.md that Claude already follows by default

name: support-designless-tasks
description: Allow tasks driven by Linear issue description alone without requiring docs/designs/*.md

name: pre-warm-codebase-context
description: Use CLAUDE.md project summary + tree output as injected context so agent doesn't explore blind

name: model-selection-per-project
description: Add model field to ProjectConfig and pass --model flag to claude CLI for per-project/per-run-type model selection

name: trim-review-feedback-tokens
description: Extract only reviewer name, comment body, and file paths from review JSON instead of dumping raw metadata
